subject: [PATCH v2 6/6] mm: rename ARCH_ENABLE_THP_MIGRATION to ARCH_HAS_PMD_SOFTLEAVES

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch renames the CONFIG_ARCH_ENABLE_THP_MIGRATION configuration option to CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PMD_SOFTLEAVES in various architectures, including x86, arm64, s390, riscv, loongarch, and powerpc. The rename is motivated by upcoming PMD-level swap entries that can use the same PMD softleaf helpers without depending on page migration. This change does not introduce any functional changes but updates the configuration option name to better reflect its purpose.
